_source: Google SRE Workbook Ch.5 burn-rate/time-to-exhaustion table for a 30-day (720h) budget. t = remaining * P / BR. Results in hours.

cases.description: full budget at burn rate 1 lasts the whole 30d = 720h
full budget at burn rate 10 exhausts in 3d = 72h
full budget at burn rate 100 exhausts in 7.2h
full budget at burn rate 1000 (total outage) exhausts in 0.72h ~= 43.2 min
half the budget left at burn rate 14.4 exhausts in 25h
